# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

apiVersion: elasticsearch.k8s.elastic.co/v1beta1
kind: Elasticsearch
metadata:
  name: elasticsearch
spec:
  version: 7.10.1
  nodeSets:
    - name: default
      count: 3
      resources:
        requests:
          memory: 4Gi
        limits:
          memory: 8Gi
      config:
        xpack.security.enabled: true
        xpack.monitoring.collection.enabled: true
        xpack.snapshotting.enabled: true
        xpack.cluster.routing.allocation.enable: "all"
        index.number_of_shards: 1
        index.number_of_replicas: 0
  snapshotRepositories:
    - name: s3-repo
      config:
        type: s3
        settings:
          bucket: my-snapshot-bucket
          region: us-east-1
          endpoint: s3.amazonaws.com
          access_key_id: ACCESS_KEY_ID
          secret_access_key: SECRET_ACCESS_KEY
    - name: fileshare-repo
      config:
        type: fs
        settings:
          location: /path/to/file/share
  snapshotSchedules:
    - name: weekly-snapshot
      schedule: "0 0 * * 7"
      repository: s3-repo
      retention:
        expire_after: 2w
